channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Found a dead decomposed fox, 16th July
item.description:
Flies and maggots all over it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ranworth Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Catton Street, 16th July
item.description:
Lorry drove over the pavement and cracked it. Major trip hazard

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Catton Street, Holborn, Greater London

item.title: Abandoned bakes., 16th July

These bikes have been in disrepair and left here for years.

item.title: Abandoned sofa in bin area, 16th July
item.description:
This sofa has been there for over a week and has been abandoned.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bethune Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Flytipping, 16th July
item.description:
Obstructing pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Conway Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish on road, 16th July
item.description:
Two bins were emptied yesterday and this box and rubbish was on top of the bins. For some reason the waste collectors decided to empty the bins but throw the loose rubbish that was on top in the road!!! Do they only collect rubbish actually in the bin!! I really don't understand this situation with your collection operatives, it is mad to throw stuff on the floor and leave it when you are suppose to be clearing it!!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherman Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed and mattress left on pavement, 16th July
item.description:
There is a bed, mat

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stansfield Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please remove, 16th July

item.title: Parked for 8 weeks no mot stoppi, 16th July
item.description:
Neighbour with 5 cars on property has left this car parked up unmoved for 8 weeks . other neighbours cant park as no space thanks to this one family. illegally parked as no mot please rwmove or fine causing problems with parking for other tax payers

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longleigh Lane, Abbey Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
